zh.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本
zh.First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex,: 美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Abigail Read於1634年2月出生在英國諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋時，她的父親William Reed48歲，母親Mabel Kendall27歲。她於1650年10月2日與Francis Wyman在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本結婚。他們至少是9個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1699年11月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年65歲，埋葬在美國麻薩諸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

zh-hans.First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex,: 美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Abigail Read于1634年2月出生在英国諾圖波藍德紐可亞斯特爾 武朋时，她的父亲William Reed48岁，母亲Mabel Kendall27岁。她于1650年10月2日与Francis Wyman在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本结婚。他们至少是9个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1699年11月30日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼米德萊可沃本享年65岁，埋葬在美国马萨诸塞州米德萊可沃本費爾斯特 布利亞爾 格洛德。

nameMeanings.name: Read
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Reed  .

History: A family called Read were established in America in the early 18th century by John Read, who was born in Dublin, sixth in descent from Sir Thomas Read of Berkshire, England. His son, George Read (1733–98), was one of the signers of the Declaration of Independence, and as a lawyer helped frame the Constitution.

variants.name: Red
meanings: Americanized form (translation into English) of German   Roth  .

variants.name: Reed
meanings: English and Scottish: nickname from Middle English and Older Scots red(e) ‘red’, no doubt denoting someone with red hair or a ruddy complexion.

English: from Middle English ride, rede, rude (Old English rīed, rēod, rȳd) ‘clearing’. The surname may be topographic for someone who lived in or near a clearing, or habitational, for someone who lived at one of a number of places so named, including Rede Court in Strood (Kent), Rides in Eastchurch (Kent), Ride Way in Ewhurst (Surrey), and Reed Farm in Wadhurst (Sussex). The word is particularly common in the southeastern counties of England, from Kent to the Isle of Wight. See also Rider and Reader .

English: habitational name from Read (Lancashire), Reed (Hertfordshire), or Rede (Suffolk). The Lancashire placename derives from Old English rǣge ‘roe, female roe deer’ + hēafod ‘head’. The Hertfordshire placename derives from Old English rȳhth ‘rough piece of ground’. The etymology of the Suffolk placename is uncertain.

nameMeanings.name: Abigail
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘father of exaltation’ in Hebrew, borne by one of King David's wives, who had earlier been married to Nabal (1 Samuel 25:3), and by the mother of Absalom's captain Amasa (2 Samuel 1:25). The name first came into general use in Britain in the 16th century, under Puritan influence. It was a common name in literature for a lady's maid, for example in  Beaumont  and  Fletcher's  play The Scornful Lady (  1616 ). The biblical Abigail refers to herself as ‘thy servant’ in addressing King David. In Ireland this name has traditionally been used as an Anglicized form of Gobnat , although the reasons for this are not clear. It was popular in the 17th century, especially among Puritans and Nonconformists, and has again enjoyed considerable favour since the 1990s.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.
Oldest grave seen in memorials list.

historicEvents.title: Glorious Revolution
historicEvents.description: The Glorious Revolution brought the downfall of Catholic King James II and the reign of his Protestant daughter Mary and her Dutch husband, William III of Orange.

en.lifeSummary: When Abigail Read was born in February 1634, in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, her father, William Reed, was 48 and her mother, Mabel Kendall, was 27. She married Francis Wyman on 2 October 1650, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 9 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 30 November 1699, in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 65, and was buried in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, United States.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Abigail Read est née en février 1634, à Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, William Reed, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Mabel Kendall, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Francis Wyman le 2 octobre 1650, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 9 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 30 novembre 1699, à Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, États-Unis.

de.lifeSummary: Als Abigail Read im Februar 1634 in Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater William Reed 48 und ihre Mutter Mabel Kendall 27. Sie hat am 2. Oktober 1650 in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Francis Wyman geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 9 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 30. November 1699 im Alter von 65 Jahren in Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Vereinigte Staaten begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Read è nata il nel febbraio 1634 nel Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, England, sua padre, William Reed, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Mabel Kendall, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Francis Wyman il 2 ottobre 1650, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 9 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 30 novembre 1699, nel Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Stati Uniti d'America.

ja.Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Eng: イギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トイン
ja.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルン
ja.First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex,: アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスウオブルンフィルスト ブリアル グロウンド
ja.lifeSummary: Abigail Readが1634年2月にイギリスノースウンバーランドニューカストル ウプオン トインで生まれた時，父William Reedは48歳，母Mabel Kendallは27歳であった。1650年10月2日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンでFrancis Wymanと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも9人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1699年11月30日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーミッドレセックスウオブルンで65歳で死去し，アメリカ合衆国マサチューセッツ州ミッドレセックスウオブルンフィルスト ブリアル グロウンドにて埋葬された。

ko.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번
ko.First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex,: 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 보번 피르스트 버이앨 그라운드
ko.lifeSummary: Abigail Read(이)가 1634년 2월 영국 노르스벌랜드 뉴카스틀 업 타이니에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Reed(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Mabel Kendall(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1650년 10월 2일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 Francis Wyman(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 아홉 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1699년 11월 30일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 미들레세스 보번에서 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 미국 매사추세츠 주 미들레세스 보번 피르스트 버이앨 그라운드에 묻혔다.

pt.First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex,: First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Abigail Read nasceu em fevereiro de 1634, em Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Reed, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Mabel Kendall, tinha 27 anos. Ela casou-se com Francis Wyman em 2 de outubro de 1650, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 9 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 30 de novembro de 1699, em Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts, Estados Unidos da América.

ru.Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Col: вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика
ru.First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex,: фирст буряль гроунд, вобурн, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Abigail Read родилась февраль 1634 г. в местности нюкастл упон тин, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени William Reed было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Mabel Kendall, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Francis Wyman 2 октября 1650 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 9 сыновей и 3 дочери. Она умерла 30 ноября 1699 г. в местности вобурн, миддлесекс, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности фирст буряль гроунд, вобурн, миддлесекс, Массачусетс, Соединенные штаты.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Abigail Read nació en febrero de 1634, en Newcastle upon Tyne, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, William Reed, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Mabel Kendall, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Francis Wyman el 2 de octubre de 1650, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Fueron padres de por lo menos 9 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió el 30 de noviembre de 1699, en Woburn, Middlesex, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en First Burial Ground, Woburn, Middlesex, Masachusets, Estados Unidos.
